thinking: I move down a long open room with wood flooring and white walls toward a woman standing against the right wall; she stays mostly still, facing slightly left, with one brief hand movement near her face. As I get closer, I pass her and pan left, revealing a yellow rectangular table with matching chairs, plus a kitchenette area with lower cabinets, sink, kettle, pots, and a tall refrigerator. The woman leaves the wall and walks toward the table, placing her hands on the tabletop and chair as she positions herself. She then lowers into the chair and sits at the far side of the table while I stop nearby facing her.
caption: CLERK: My apparent objective was to approach and monitor/assist the customer area, and I did this by walking toward the woman, then moving to the table area and stopping near her after she sat down. CUSTOMER: She appeared to want a place to sit or wait, expressing this by standing aside initially, then walking to the table, steadying herself with her hands, pulling into position, and sitting in the chair.
